data.body: DONE: typed Config added to src/rebar/config.py — stdlib dataclass (no pydantic), CORE sections (verify/ticket/compact/sync/mcp/reconciler/jira/scratch) with the decided defaults; from_mapping coerces+validates (incl. bool-rejected-as-int guard, case-insensitive choices), honors the verify legacy alias (new key wins), and WARNS (never silently drops) on unknown sections/keys; invalid values raise ConfigError (fail-closed at load). llm.* intentionally excluded (stays in rebar.llm so core stays decoupled from the agents extra). 14 unit tests (defaults/coercion/validation/unknown-warn/alias). Subagent-reviewed: solid, no bugs; the one design note (sparse-merge for layering) recorded on 43a0/83e6. Unit tier green (231 passed). NOTE: location/precedence/portability verification is deferred to 43a0 (loader) where it is meaningful.
